narrative:
Precinct Rootstown A (precinct in Portage County) has 1,115 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.9 percentage points.
